entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for productivity in the Sahelian region of Niger

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living biological organisms produced by the crop

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: A measure of the acidity or alkalinity of the soil

entities.name: LOW-INPUT MINERAL FERTILIZER MICRODOSING
entities.description: A technology involving the application of small doses of mineral fertilizer

entities.name: NUTRIENT HILL PLACEMENT
entities.description: The practice of applying nutrients specifically at the planting hill

entities.name: PLANTING DENSITIES
entities.description: The number of plants grown per unit area

entities.name: FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies used to maintain or improve soil fertility

entities.name: REMOVAL OF CROP RESIDUE
entities.description: The practice of removing plant remains from the field after harvest

entities.name: MINERAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Inorganic fertilizers containing essential plant nutrients

entities.name: NPK
entities.description: A mineral fertilizer containing nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium

entities.name: ORGANIC MANURE
entities.description: Decomposed organic matter used as fertilizer

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils with a low pH value, typically between 4 and 5

entities.name: LOW CARBON CONTENT
entities.description: Soil with a low percentage of organic carbon, specifically around 0.2%

entities.name: NUTRIENT MINING
entities.description: The process where nutrients are removed from the soil faster than they are replaced

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in West Africa where the studies were conducted

entities.name: SAHELIAN SOILS
entities.description: Soils characteristic of the Sahel region of Niger
